'''yarawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycophenol|mycophenol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-r-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycophenol|mycophenol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yarawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæræwæth|yæræwæth]] || [[word:yæræwæj|yæræwæj]] || [[word:yæræwæsh|yæræwæsh]] || [[word:yæræwæ|yæræwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yararawath|yararawath]] || [[word:yararawaj|yararawaj]] || [[word:yararawash|yararawash]] || [[word:yararawa|yararawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yarawath|yarawath]] || [[word:yarawaj|yarawaj]] || [[word:yarawash|yarawash]] || [[word:yarawa|yarawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yarafwafth|yarafwafth]] || [[word:yarafwafj|yarafwafj]] || [[word:yarafwafsh|yarafwafsh]] || [[word:yarafwaf|yarafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yarawatha|yarawatha]] || [[word:yarawaja|yarawaja]] || [[word:yarawasha|yarawasha]] || [[word:yarawaka|yarawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yarawath|yarawath]] || [[word:yarawaj|yarawaj]] || [[word:yarawash|yarawash]] || [[word:yarawa|yarawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yarawathal|yarawathal]] || [[word:yarawajal|yarawajal]] || [[word:yarawashal|yarawashal]] || [[word:yarawakal|yarawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yarawaathatha|yarawaathatha]] || [[word:yarawaajaja|yarawaajaja]] || [[word:yarawaashasha|yarawaashasha]] || [[word:yarawaaka|yarawaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yarawathan|yarawathan]] || [[word:yarawajan|yarawajan]] || [[word:yarawashan|yarawashan]] || [[word:yarawakan|yarawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yarawathaoro|yarawathaoro]] || [[word:yarawajaoro|yarawajaoro]] || [[word:yarawashaoro|yarawashaoro]] || [[word:yarawakaoro|yarawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
